id.description: The unique ID of the token exchange profile.

subject_token_type.description: Subject token type for this profile. When receiving a token exchange request on the Authentication API, the corresponding token exchange profile with a matching subject_token_type will be executed. This must be a URI.

action_id.description: The ID of the Custom Token Exchange action to execute for this profile, in order to validate the subject_token. The action must use the custom-token-exchange trigger.

created_at.description: The time when this profile was created.

updated_at.description: The time when this profile was updated.
